runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Replace javax.servlet imports with jakarta.servlet to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 21.
Use Java 16+ pattern matching for instanceof to eliminate explicit casting.
Replace String.format with the String.formatted method introduced in Java 15 for cleaner string interpolation.
Migrated the PreDestroy annotation import from javax.annotation to jakarta.annotation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ standards required by the target JDK/Spring Boot version.
Replace deprecated Charset.forName with StandardCharsets constant for modern Java style.
Use CookieLocaleResolver constructor to set cookie name instead of deprecated setter method.
Added configuration fields for Mailjet public and private API keys to support a new email provider.
Added a configuration field to select the active mail provider, enabling switching between SendGrid and Mailjet.
Added getter methods for the new Mailjet API keys and active mail provider configuration.
Removes the explicit @Autowired annotation from the constructor to rely on Spring's implicit single-constructor injection.
Replaces `!Optional.isPresent()` with `Optional.isEmpty()` for more idiomatic Java 21 code style.
Replaced field injection with constructor injection to adhere to modern Spring best practices and improve testability.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.human_impl: Replaced @Autowired fields with final fields and a constructor accepting dependencies.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Added a new step to warn users about upcoming deletions before actually deleting old running dinners.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.human_impl: Added call to warnAboutDeletion(LocalDateTime.now()) in the scheduled method and implemented the corresponding logic.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Wrapped scheduled task operations in try-catch blocks to prevent unhandled exceptions from stopping the scheduler.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.human_impl: Added try-catch blocks around warnAboutDeletion and deleteOldRunningDinnerInstances calls with logging.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Moved date calculation logic for deletion and warning thresholds to the service layer.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.human_impl: Replaced local calculateDateForDeletion with calls to runningDinnerDeletionService.calculateFilterDateForDeletion and calculateFilterDateForWarn.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Improved log messages to include formatted dinner dates and cancellation dates for better traceability.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.human_impl: Added getFormattedDinnerDate helper and updated LOGGER.info calls to include these details.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Changed the logger field to be final to follow Java best practices.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.human_impl: Changed 'private static Logger LOGGER' to 'private static final Logger LOGGER'.

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Renamed the scheduled method to reflect that it now performs both warning and deletion actions.
Migrate validation imports from javax.validation to jakarta.validation to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 21.
Remove the @Autowired annotation from the constructor to align with Spring Boot's implicit single-constructor injection behavior.
Inject MessageService to enable sending deletion warning notifications.
Inject RunningDinnerService to access user preferences for tracking warning status.
Define configuration constants for deletion retention and warning periods.
Consolidate participant-related imports into a wildcard import for cleaner code.
Ensure participant changes are immediately flushed to the database during deletion.
Implement logic to warn users about upcoming dinner deletion based on preferences.
runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.human_impl: public void warnAboutDeletion(RunningDinner runningDinner, LocalDateTime now) { ... }

runningdinner-backend/src/main/java/org/.general_idea: Add helper methods to calculate date thresholds for deletion and warning filters.
Replaced javax.persistence import with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 21/Spring Boot 3.
Replaced deprecated TransactionSynchronizationAdapter with the functional TransactionSynchronization interface to align with modern Spring Framework APIs.
Added validation logic for zip restrictions to ensure data integrity during running dinner creation or updates.
Extended the copyBasicDetails method to propagate zip restrictions from the input info object to the destination entity.
Removed unused imports and consolidated remaining imports to improve code readability and reduce clutter.
Removed obsolete public method generateNewAdminId which was likely superseded by internal usage or other services.
Removed obsolete protected method checkRunningDinnerExists which was likely superseded by repository-level checks or other validation logic.
Changed logger field to final to adhere to best practices for immutable static fields.
Added @NotNull annotation to ApplicationContext parameter to enable static analysis tools to verify non-null constraints.
Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Java 21 environments.
